title: API Keys
description: Manage API keys for accessing the gateway.
saveKeyWarning: Save this key — it won't be shown again.
copyKeyBeforeClosing: Please copy the key before closing
deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. Any applications using this key will lose access immediately.

form.name: Name
form.modelWhitelistHint: Comma-separated model names. Empty = all models allowed.
form.rpmLimitHint: Requests per minute. 0 or empty = unlimited.
form.tpmLimitHint: Tokens per minute. 0 or empty = unlimited.

empty.title: No API Keys yet
empty.description: Create your first API key to start using the gateway.
